title: Department Manager Vacancy at Burger King India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Burger King India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Burger King India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Chennai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Burger King India:
Burger King India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Burger King India!
